mise.description: Connects to mise to manage the local developer environment. Use this server when you need to inspect installed tool versions (Node.js, Python, etc.), view project environment variables, read local configurations, or execute workspace automation tasks via the run_task tool.

markitdown.description: Convert documents to Markdown (Office, PDF, HTML, images)

websearch.description: Exa AI web search — real-time web, news, and code search

context7.description: Up-to-date library documentation and code examples
